notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the qemu-kvm SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.2. It addresses 6 CVEs: CVE-2023-3019, CVE-2023-3255, CVE-2023-42467, CVE-2023-5088, CVE-2023-6683, and 1 more.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
